channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: The Hunter
item.description: Adds animal tracking clues, bleeding, droppings, wounded movement, and carcass carrying.

item.title: Grinding Wheel Rework
item.description: Expands grinding wheel to support more tools and turns sharpening into a lightweight repair system

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: Custom Server Patch
item.description: A collection of tweaks for our private server.

item.title: Biodiversity: Orchards
item.description: Adds several new fruit trees for all your juicing and fruity needs. Part of the Biodiversity Suite

item.title: C4B Traducciones-ES - JUEGO
item.description: Traducción actualizada y mejorada del Juego, en Español-ES | Incluidas nuevas Guías

item.title: GamepadCompanionVS
item.description: Native gamepad support for Vintage Story 1.22+ — 12-slot radial menu, virtual cursor for GUI, etc.

item.title: C4B Traducciones-ES - MODS
item.description: Paquete de Traducciones de Mods en Español-ES

item.title: Ritual Apotheosis
item.description: Build ancient rites from fragments. The world is your altar. Dig deep. Seek truth. Light the fires.

item.title: Uranium Expanded (Metals and Tools)
item.description: Adds uranium based alloys, adds uranium glass, tools and uranium fever.

item.title: Projectile Tracker
item.description: A QoL mod that automatically creates and deletes waypoints for projectiles you fire.

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: Fix Perish Rate
item.description: Fix perish rate.

item.title: Panning Machine
item.description: Simple machine for panning

item.title: Full Sailboat Refund
item.description: Get 100% of your sailboat back when you deconstruct it with a saw

item.title: VSA - BeamQoL
item.description: Survival-compatible, symmetric & systematic beam placement, clean snap logic. Updates will follow

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: ChunkLOD
item.description: A Heavily Modified Fork of Farseer, representing terrain, rock type, forestation, and water as LOD's

item.title: Realistic Rapids
item.description: Makes rapids and waterwheels work more realistically. Official addon for Realistic Water

item.title: WebCartographer
item.description: Creates a map of a world to be browsed in a webbrowser.

item.title: Armor Shift Click
item.description: Makes shift clicking armor (and other character clothing) into the their respective slots possible.

item.title: Ancient Dungeons (Th3Dungeon)
item.description: Adds procedural generated dungeons to the underground of Vintage Story

item.title: Aldi's Classes [Races PATCH]
item.description: Aldi's Classes Patch mod to use the races from Racial Equality with unique traits

item.title: Vampirism
item.description: Become a creature of the night, drink blood, see in the dark and never touch silver again

item.title: Aldi's Classes
item.description: An extremely stable, compatible and customizable classes mod!

item.title: Temporal Vessels - A Vessel Teleportation System
item.description: Teleport a storage vessel back to your base so you can continue your looting exploration adventure

item.title: Frontiers RPG
item.description: An ARPG system for Vintage Story

item.title: Frontiers Classes
item.description: Character class and progression system.

item.title: ALDI's classes SAM FORK
item.description: Completely rebalanced fork for the Steam and Mud server. Code by FiveCubeI3CTA

item.title: Frontiers Durability
item.description: A simple clothing degradation mod
